contract_notes: Use the existing public single_life_table contract: a single default variant with an ordered array of objects containing age and distribution_period.
This entry covers Table I only. Do not duplicate uniform_lifetime_table or joint_life_table rows in this pipeline output.

Do not mark schema_change_required merely because the table begins at age 0 or because Publication 590-B labels the table as effective beginning in 2022. Those are expected characteristics of the current public contract.
